remaining_params.SpellDescription: Look at the top X cards of your library. Put up to two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, create a tapped Powerstone token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast a nonartifact spell.")
